svg.text: How Expensive are Night Outs Per Country
Various nightly activities cost in different countries

g.aria-label: How Expensive are Night Outs Per Country with 12 bars To navigate the chart, use Enter to move into the list of bars or use the arrow keys to navigate the chart information.

Australia Cost bar, 189.95, 1 of 12 bars. To navigate the list of bars, use the arrow keys to move between bars in list order, use Page Up or Page Down to move between bars by value order, use Shift + Enter to return to the group list.
Czech Republic Cost bar, 132.81, 3 of 12 bars.
Hong Kong Cost bar, 175.96, 5 of 12 bars.
Mexico Cost bar, 105.17, 7 of 12 bars. End of value order.
USA Cost bar, 512.62, 12 of 12 bars. End of list order.

rect.aria-label: X axis shows Countries and ranges from Australia to USA
Y axis shows Cost (in USD $) and ranges from 0 to 600
